settings.subheading: Share about our website on your WhatsApp status and get a free plant with your next order.

settings.description:
Steps:

  1. Share our Website on your WhatsApp Status.
  2. Take a screenshot of the status with 150 viewers and email info@theaffordableorganicstore.com.
  3. You will receive the store credit worth Rs 50 that you can use with next order to buy a plant. 
  4. Use the store credit at your checkout and avail yourself of the offer.

settings.heading: Get a free plant with your next order!!!

settings.heading: Get a chance to win a free plant!!

settings.subheading: Make an unboxing video of our products and get a chance to win a free plant with your next order.

settings.description:
Steps:

  1. Make an unboxing video of our products and share it on YouTube.
  2. Send the video link via email to info@theaffordableorganicstore.com.
  3. You will receive the store credit worth Rs 50 that you can use with next order to buy a plant. 
  4. Use the store credit at your checkout and avail yourself of the offer.

settings.subheading: Write a blog and get a free plant with your next order.

settings.description:
Steps:

  1. Write a blog about gardening and include a link to www.theaffordableorganicstore.com in the blog.
  2. Send the blog link via email to info@theaffordableorganicstore.com.
  3. You will receive the store credit worth Rs 50 that you can use with next order to buy a plant in your email once our team approves the blog.
  4. Submit a plagiarism-free blog post, written by someone with prior experience in the field. The content should meet a minimum standard of quality and relevance to sustainability, organic living, or gardening.
  5. Use the store credit at your checkout and avail yourself of the offer.
